copy.on_your_turn_roll_the_dice_and_move_forw: On your turn, roll the dice and move forward by that number.
copy.snakes_send_you_down_ladders_send_you_up: Snakes send you down, ladders send you up — classic board.
copy.a_roll_past_100_doesn_t_move_you_you_sta: A roll past 100 doesn't move you (you stay put).
